prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GRNGOLDPANKIT-7PC Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Gold Rush Gold Prospecting Pan Kit with Glass Vials Pocket Scale 7pc Description: The ASR Outdoor compact gold prospecting bundle comes with 7 essential tools for identifying, collecting, and evaluating gold flakes and precious metals while panning for valuable materials - glass collection vials, a gold sifting pan, a pocket scale, and polyethylene pipette droppers.

This gold panning kit comes with a 10" diameter green gold pan with dual riffles designed to sift through dirt and silt for gold nuggets and flakes. The deep green color will ensure your ability to locate and sift through silt and sand for valuable materials.

The ASR Outdoor gold rush set features 3 glass collection vials with a capacity of 2 drams each (.125 oz). The large-sized vials are ideal for storing gems, gold flakes, and other precious metals located during gold prospecting. Each vial comes with an air-tight plastic lid to keep your valuable findings stored during transit out of the field.

In addition, we've included a lightweight pocket scale ideal for weighing metals, gems, and gold flakes you locate while panning out in the field. It measures just 4.8" x 2.5" so it will easily fit inside any standard backpacks, bags, or pockets.

Lastly, we've added 2 non-toxic polyethylene industrial pipette droppers designed to easily draw and dispense liquids, gold, and other particles. They each have a capacity of 3mL and have a length of 5.5".

Gold panning is a great outdoor activity for adults and children alike. This compact kit easily fits inside most standard backpacks and travel bags, making it a great bundle for camping and hiking adventures. Take this set with you next time you go out to prospect, and maybe you'll strike it rich. Search Terms: gold prospecting rush equipment supplies rockhounding equipment for adults kids gold rush nuggets gold panning kit equipment pans pay dirt rocks and gems tools and supplies camping essentials supplies accessories gold sluice box matting tools Features: - ESSENTIAL GOLD PROSPECTING TOOLS - The ASR Outdoor gold panning kit comes with 7 essential tools for locating, collecting, and evaluating gems and minerals while panning for gold - a gold pan, glass collection vials, pipette droppers, and a pocket scale. - 10" DIAMETER GOLD PAN - The kit comes with a 10" diameter dual riffle green gold pan designed to sift through silt and dirt for gold flakes. The dark green color ensures you'll be able to identify and separate precious metals from sand and dirt. - GLASS COLLECTION VIALS - The set features 3 collection vials with a 2-dram capacity (.125oz). The large glass vials are great for storing gold flakes, gems, and other valuable finds during gold prospecting. Each vial comes with an air-tight plastic lid to keep your findings safe during transit. - COMPACT POCKET SCALE - The digital pocket scale features high precision sensors that can measure in five different units including grams, ounces, tola, carat, and grains; its versatility is ideal for weighing precious metals, gems, coins, or stones. Measuring just 4.8 inches by 2.5 inches, the scale is lightweight and compact, making it easy to carry, pack or store in a jacket pocket when you're gold panning in the field. - PIPETTE DROPPERS - Included are 2 3mL capacity industrial pipette droppers designed to easily draw and dispense gold, liquids, and particles. They measure 5.5" in length and come with easy-to-read graduation markers. They are made of non-toxic polyethylene. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7pc Gold Prospecting Pan Kit

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7-pc Green Gold Prospecting Pan Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: 10 Inch Green Gold Pan, Glass Vials, Digital Scale, Pipette Droppers, Portable

openai.title_differentiation: 7-Piece Bundle, 10" Dual-Riffle Gold Pan, 3 Glass Vials, Pocket Scale, 2 Pipette Droppers, Compact Field Kit
